title: Huawei Mic 500, omnidirectional microphone
description: Huawei CloudLink Mic 500 series featuring compact design with omnidirectional, 6-meter sound pickup capability adopts lossless wideband audio transmission and 3A audio-processing technology. When deployed with Huawei video conferencing endpoints, it delivers a superior Hi-Fi stereo audio experience Designed by the top design company, Huawei Mic 500 series microphone array features an elegant yet practical design in dark colors with silver trim. The expanded metal mesh structure ensures superior audio pickup quality, and the mute function uses a single-button control for user convenience. With its low power consumption, refined appearance, and compact design (no more than 15 cm), this device adds a professional look to any environment The microphone array can be connected directly to the video endpoint and be ready for use without configuration, for quick plug and play operation Depending on the endopint model, up to 3 microphones can be cascaded

title: Huawei IdeaHub Camera200, PTZ camera for IdeaHub
description: HUAWEI CloudLink Camera 200 is a next-generation 4K UHD PTZ camera that works with Huawei's UHD video conferencing endpoint range or cloud-registered soft clients, creating an unprecedented video conferencing experience The CloudLink Camera 200 was built with the system integrator in mind, enabling an ultra-wide field of view and powerful zoom capabilities. Its elegant, fashionable appearance makes it a natural fit in modern offices Easy maintenance and configuration are made possible by the embedded on screen display user interface, which allows the camera to be operated independently. Camera operations are also supported on the remote control or touch panel of the connected Huawei endpoint The 8.51 megapixel Complementary Metal-Oxide-Semiconductor (CMOS) image sensor provides High-Definition Multimedia Interface (HDMI) video output of up to 1080p 60 fps. Image enhancement, based on the human visual system, and 3D video noise reduction, based on motion estimation, present images in true color, capturing every detail Camera200 Power adapter with power cable Cable USB 3.0 Cable HDMI Remote control + batteries Mounting bracket + screws

description: The Huawei ICD OPS i7 D is a compact computer module based on the Intel OPS-C standard , designed for integration with Huawei IdeaHub intelligent display. It is equipped with an Intel ® Coreâ¢ i7-10700 processor and integrated Intel ® UHD Graphics 630, supporting dual independent 4K output . Installation is simple - the module slides directly into the OPS slot, requiring no additional cables or external power supply The module includes 16GB DDR4 RAM and a 512GB M.2 SSD for fast system startup. It also offers (1) M.2 2230 slot for further expansion and (1) RJ-45 , (3) USB 3.0 , (3) USB 2.0 , (1) HDMI 1.4 , (1) DisplayPort 1.2 , audio line-out a mic-in . The operating system is Windows 10 IoT Enterprise

title: Ubiquiti AF-11, airFiber 11

For SISO mode usage is necesary buy separately low or high duplexer (depends on freqeuncy what you want to use). For MIMO usage is necessary to buy 2 same duplexers AirFiber 11 without any duplexers works in very wide frequency band (10.7.GHz to 11.7GHz), bandwidth from 3,5 to 56MHz and using different Tx and Rx frequencies AF-11 device PoE adapter 50V/1.2A Power cord

title: Ubiquiti AirFiber AF-24, 1.4Gbps+ Backhaul, 24GHz (price per piece)
description: Designed to be a high-performance backhaul, the airFiber ®24 delivers amazing wireless throughput of up to 1.4+ Gbps , surpassing conventional wired backhauls. The airFiber ®24 operates in worldwide, license-free, 24 GHz frequencies . Users can deploy airFiber24 almost anywhere they choose (subject to local country regulations) airFiber features a dual-independent, 2x2 MIMO , high-gain reflector antenna system. Separate yet integrated transmit ( TX) and receive (RX) antennas help extend link budgets by eliminating the extra RF losses caused by the switches or duplexers required in systems with common TX/RX antennas Conventional wireless standards impose a latency by having to receive a packet before a packet is transmitted. airFiber can transmit data synchronously without any wait time. airFiber features traditional TDD and FDD modes of operation in addition to the proprietary Hybrid Division Duplexing (HDD) mode, which provides a breakthrough in range and spectral efficiency performance Based on the ranging algorithm built into the air protocol, the airFiber radios use patent-pending HDD technology to calculate the propagation delay and know when each radio can transmit and receive, so they send packets in precise synchronization. Packet transmission latency is virtually eliminated For seamless monitoring and settings is used in the unit 2 Ethernet ports , one of whom is designed only for management 2nd one for data and management Device PoE power adapter Power cord Holder

title: RF elements Asymmetrical Horn Antenna Carrier Class, 5GHz, 20,5dBi, 20 °
description: AH20-CC is a 5GHz sector antenna of the "horn" type of a new generation from the RF elements workshop and is characterized by 20 ° asymmetric beam angle (30 ° in the elevation plane) , gain 20.5 dBi and 2x N-Female connectors. This antenna offers the perfect combination of features and functions that address the major weaknesses of today's mainstream sector antennas Asymmetrical Horn CC Antennas have naturally suppressed side lobes because of their optimized design: they focus energy into a single main beam. Absence of side lobes enables excellent noise immunity of a network when using Asymmetrical Horn CC Antennas Mainstream patch array sector antennas have radiation pattern extremely wide in the azimuth and extremely narrow in the elevation plane. If an AP is deployed on a tall tower, customers near the tower suffer from low AP signal level. Asymmetrical Horn CC Antennas provide valuable extra degrees of the elevation beam width, shrinking the null zone while preserving the increased gain for long-range performance Unique radiation characteristics, minimal side lobes and extremely low back radiation allow the placement of multiple antennas at one point and the construction of multiple separate points, which will allow better distribution of load on individual APs and increase speeds to individual clients Aymxx-CC asymmetric antennas are equipped with an innovative mounting system. Mounting the bracket and antenna is separate and performed in two steps Antenna Precision holder

description: MikroTik Cloud Smart Switch CSS610-8P-2S+IN is a manageable, 8-port Gigabit PoE Switch with two SFP+ slots (backwards compatible with SFP modules as well), without a fan and a kit for attaching to a 19" rack. It has an elegant appearance, does not affect residence decoration and can be conveniently routed on various decoration materials The single-fiber optical cable is available in various lengths from 10m to 100m and is equipped with SC/APC connectors on both ends Self bonding without heating for quick cabling after removing the release film Passed the CPR Dca flame retardant certification, meeting the fireproof requirements, and applicable to indoor scenarios Transparent design for aesthetic cabling Transparent optical cable is a pre-adhesive cable. title: MikroTik LtAP-2HnD&R11e-LTE7, LtAP LTE7 kit
description: The MikroTik LtAP LTE7 kit is a rugged 4G LTE Wi-Fi 4 AP , supplied with the R11e-LTE7 modem and a built-in GPS module, perfect for vehicular deployments. The device features (1) 1Gbit PoE-In port , (3) mini SIM slots and (1) SMA female connector for a GPS antenna The modem supports 4G LTE (Cat. 7) and 3G networks, with speeds of up to 300Mbps downlink and 100Mbps uplink . It utilizes 2x2 MIMO on the downlink and carrier aggregation , which allows the simultaneous use of multiple LTE bands . This feature improves response times and connection stability in high-traffic areas and can enhance transmission efficiency in locations with weaker signal conditions (1) 1Gbit passive PoE-In port , (1) USB 2.0 port , (1) SMA female connector for a GPS antenna , (1) RS232 console port and (2) internal LTE antennas (3) mini SIM slots - with automatic roaming Free miniPCI-e slot for expansion - add a second LTE modem, a 5 GHz interface or a LoRa module RouterOS v7 L4 provides full control - no subscriptions and no locked features Flexible power options 12-30V - passive PoE, 4-pin automotive DC connector or DC jack IP54 - weather-resistant enclosure Device Power adapter 24V/1.2A (4) Screws and wall anchors 4-pin automotive DC cable

title: Huawei SmartAX MA5801-FL04 compact OLT, 4x FlexPON, 1U
description: As optical fiber access nodes keep moving closer to end users, OLTs are closer to end users. Deployment scenarios are complex and diversified. In this case, network needs OLTs with small volume and low density The MA5801-FL04-H1 is a small-sized box-shaped OLT. It provides four FlexPON service ports and can work with a FlexPON optical module to support GPON, XG(S)-PON, and XG(S)-PON&GPON access. It also provides a unified bearer platform for multiple services, such as broadband, voice, video streaming, and video backhaul services. The product enables one fiber network to carry all types of services, simplifying the network architecture and reducing the OPEX. It allows to connect up to 1024 ONTs The product provides multiple fiber to the home (FTTH) solutions to meet the requirements of economical and efficient network construction . MA5801-GP08 can be flexibly deployed in fast fixed mobile convergence (FMC) scenario, buildings, villages and other sparsely-populated areas In fast fixed mobile convergence (FMC) scenarios, mobile carriers fully use existing resources of backhaul networks and cabinet space when constructing FTTH networks. They deploy the MA5801 inside a mobile cabinet and route drop cables at a short distance so that nearby households can be covered under networks. All these implement fast deployment and fast go-to-market, shorten return on investment (ROI) periods, and achieve positive cycle of business The OLT is equipped with a single slot for a power module. An AC power supply is included, and an optional DC power supply can be purchased separately OLT…

title: Ubiquiti PS-5AC - airMax AC PrismStation, 5GHz Radio-only, shielded and features airPrism Active RF Filter
description: With a die-cast aluminum base and interchangeable antenna , the PrismStation and brings increased performance to your network using technology that isolates beam communications between your devices. The PrismStation AC delivers throughput speeds of up to 500+ Mbps thanks to airPrism technology The antenna horn is interchangeable and helps with beam-shaping for specific deployment and environment needs. The IsoStation also gets maximum gain out of the smallest footprint The PrismStation can use a variety of horn antenna sectors designed for increased co-location performance without sacrificing gain. Its unique beam performance and superb co-location characteristics allow for a higher density of sectors than traditional sector technology Asymmetrical horn antenna options (60 ° and 90 °) have naturally attenuated side lobes and extremely low back radiation , and they offer industry-leading front-to-back ratio and low side lobe radiation. Symmetrical horn antennas (30 ° and 45 °) are ideal for cluster sector installations with high co-location requirements PrismStation blocks or spatially filters out noise, so noise immunity is improved. title: Huawei S220-24T4X Gigabit switch, 4x SFP+
description: Huawei S220-24T4X is a managed L2 switch that is equipped with 24 Gbit ethernet ports and 4 SFP+ slots . It supports all common L2 functions and offers a wide range of management options, including management with the Huawei eKit App , which enables cloud management. Thanks to the Huawei Online Upgrade Platform (HOUP) service, the switch offers the option of automatic one-click updates Flexible Ethernet Networking: In addition to supporting traditional Spanning Tree Protocol (STP), Rapid Spanning Tree Protocol (RSTP), and Multiple Spanning Tree Protocol (MSTP), eKitEngine S220 series switches support the latest Ethernet Ring Protection Switching (ERPS) standard as defined in ITU-T G.8032. This standard provides millisecond-level protection switching based on traditional Ethernet MAC and bridging functions Diversified Security Control: eKitEngine S220 series switches support multiple security authentication modes, including MAC address authentication and 802.1X authentication . They dynamically deliver user policies such as VLAN, QoS, and ACL. The switches support port-based authentication and multi-mode authentication. They also provide protection against DoS attacks and user-targeted attacks, such as bogus DHCP servers, IP/MAC spoofing attacks, and DHCP request flood attacks. They can generate… Easy Operations and Maintenance: eKitEngine S220 series switches can be managed using SNMPv1, SNMPv2c, SNMPv3, CLI, web system , and SSHv2.0 , enabling convenient configuration and monitoring PoE Power Supply: PoE models in the eKitEngine S220 series offer several advantages: Fast…

The total PoE budget is 400W , ensuring reliable power for 24 devices under the 802.3af standard or 13 devices under the 802.3at standard with full power consumption. It supports all common L2 functions and additionally offers static routing and a DHCPv4 server. Management is possible through a web interface or via the Huawei eKit cloud service using the web portal or the… Advanced Protection Technology: In addition to supporting traditional Spanning Tree Protocol (STP) and Rapid Spanning Tree Protocol (RSTP), eKitEngine S310S is designed with the industry's latest Ethernet Ring Protection Switching (ERPS) technology defined in ITU-T G.8032, which implements millisecond-level protection switching based on traditional Ethernet MAC and bridging functions Diversified Security Control: eKitEngine S310S provides comprehensive defense against DoS attacks and user-targeted attacks. It sets up and maintains a DHCP snooping binding table and discards packets that do not match the table entries. The DHCP snooping trusted port feature ensures that users connect only to an authorized DHCP server PoE Power Supply: The Perpetual PoE feature ensures that when a PoE switch restarts (e.g., during software upgrade), it continues to supply power to the connected PDs, ensuring uninterrupted power supply Smart Upgrade: Based on Huawei Online Upgrade Repository (HOUP) , eKitEngine S310S supports smart upgrades. title: Huawei S620-24T16X8Y2CZ Gigabit switch, 16x SFP+, 8x SFP28, 2x QSFP28
description: Huawei S620-24T16X8Y2CZ is a highly equipped L3 switch with stacking capability , offering an interesting combination of ports - 24x 10/100/1000M Ethernet port, 16x 100/1000M/2.5/5/10G SFP+ port, 8x 1/2.5/5/10/25G SFP28 port, 2x 40/100G QSFP28 port . Additionally, it features a console control port, an Ethernet port for management, and a USB port for firmware updates or configuration backup transfers The back of the switch has a slot for an expansion card , which can add 8x SFP+ or 4x SFP28 ports (software configurable). Cooling is provided by a pair of hot swap fans . A power supply needs to be purchased separately, and it also supports dual power supplies for redundancy and hot swap replacement. Four power supplies are available, each with different input voltages and power ratings, with or without a fan. When using two power supplies, it is not possible to combine models with and without… The switch includes 600W AC power supply (part.no PAC600S12-PB) Device 230V AC Power Cable Ground Cable Rack mounts (14) Screws (4) Self-Adhesive Rubber Pads 600W power supply PAC600S12-PB

title: RF elements Symmetrical Horn Antenna Carrier Class, 5GHz, 11dBi, 80 °
description: Symmetrical Sectors are low loss scalar horn antennas with unique beam shape and characteristics. Their beam section is circular: azimuth and elevation radiation angles are identical. The beam pattern does not vary with frequency and antenna gain is balanced over a wide frequency range. These features make them excellent for use as Sector antennas. This antenna has 11dBi gain, 80 ° beam angle and (2) N-female connectors Symmetrical Sectors enable breakthrough scalability of wireless systems that fundamentally re-defines the approach to planning and deployment of wireless networks. We offer wide range of antenna models with exact beam pattern from 30 ° to 90 °. You are no longer forced to compromise your network design with limitations of your current vendor Symmetrical Sectors are solid metal structures - they are built to last. We use the best available materials: die cast, stamped and extruded aluminium, high quality ABS plastic and stainless steel hardware Symmetrical Sector antennas are very compact. They only have 20 - 25% footprint of traditional Sector antennas. Compact size saves tower rental fees and makes them easy to install on places where mainstream Sectors would not be allowed due to their shape and size

Physical characteristics.Material: Aluminum, Stainless steel, Polycarbonate, Polypropylene, Zinc

title: MikroTik TG-BT5-IN, IoT Bluetooth indoor tag for KNOT
description: Bluetooth tags play a huge role in IoT setups, where Bluetooth is used to broadcast the data over short distances . You can use these small devices for proximity-based tracking of various objects . For example, if you have a KNOT gateway in different parts of a construction site, you can use these tags to locate construction tools , electrical equipment, and other assets. Just attach the tags to the necessary items - and the nearest gateway will sense the tags in its proximity. Exceptionally… iBeacon Eddystone MikroTik Once activated, the tag will broadcast iBeacon, Eddystone or MikroTik telemetry advertising packets to the gateway (such as the KNOT or any other BLE gateway). These packets contain MAC address used for ID, as well as telemetry data â such as acceleration, tilt and battery charge level. The gateway then pushes the data to the remote server utilizing MQTT or HTTP protocols. By default, advertisement packets are sent once every 5 seconds, but you can change this value to your liking. For… The built-in accelerometers can not only detect acceleration (movement), but can also register if the device was dropped or tilted (free-fall detection). The indoor version of our BLE tags works best in a temperature range from 0 °C to 70 °C. It is splash-proof, and comes with a built-in accelerometer You can use Beacon manager app to configure advertisement packet type, accelerometer parameters (power mode, triggers, data rate, etc), and update the firmware

title: MikroTik TG-BT5-OUT, IoT Bluetooth outdoor tag for KNOT
description: This version of our BLE tags comes completely sealed, cast in industrial-grade molds to give it a solid IP69k ingress protection rating . In other words, this tag is dust-tight â nothing gets in, and it is fully protected against close-range high-pressure, high-temperature spray downs. Perfect for industrial telemetry systems or to track all kinds of heavy equipment and materials at a construction site iBeacon Eddystone MikroTik There is an NFC encoded MAC address and optional encryption. Unlike the indoor version, the outdoor tag comes with a built-in temperature sensor that can be used for condition monitoring. The ±0.5 °C precision can be very useful in cold supply chain logistics TG-BT5-OUT features an improved 550 mAH battery that will last around five years (with a sending interval of 1s). It is suitable for strapping to all kinds of surfaces, and it can handle a temperature range of -20 °C to 85 °C You can use Beacon manager app to configure advertisement packet type, accelerometer parameters (power mode, triggers, data rate, etc), and update the firmware

description: UniFi Category 6a indoor Ethernet cable is designed for your UniFi and general indoor network deployments that require plenum-rated cabling Available in lengths of 1000 ft (305 m), UACC-Cable-C6A-CMP is Category 6a UTP (Unshielded Twisted Pair) cabling that supports speeds of up to 1 Gbps. It uses 23 AWG solid copper conductor pairs and an anti-crosstalk divider, which improves pair isolation CMP (Communications Multipurpose cable, Plenum) cabling is for use in plenum areas where air is typically circulated in a building. Cables for these areas must adhere to strict manufacturing requirements, ensuring that they can be used in these spaces Category 6 UTP 23 AWG solid copper conductor twisted pair CMP flame rating For 1000BASE-T Ethernet applications Available in lengths of 1,000 ft (305 m)

title: RF elements directional antenna UltraHornâ¢ CC 5-24, 5GHz, 24dBi
description: UH-CC-5-24 UltraHorn TP antenna is highly directional ( 11 ° beam angle) scalar horn antennas for point-to-point connections in 5GHz band and 24 dBi antenna gain. They offer all the benefits of scalar horns: ultra noise rejection, lossless connection of radio and symmetrical beam with no side lobes. These unique radiation properties make them excellent antennas for long links in environments with a high level of noise Because horn is naturally directive antenna, it focuses the radiated fields into a single main beam without any side lobes. Commonly used antenna types, such as parabolic dish, always spills some of the energy over the aperture edge causing unwanted side lobes and interference issues UltraHorn Carrier Class features N-type female connectors, enabling connection with wide range of radios, such as Mimosa, Cambium NetworksTM PMP450, LigoWave, and many others UltraHorn CC comes as a thorough antenna solution for a high performance wireless link. There is no need to spend extra money on radomes or shrouds. Any additional shielding only burdens the tower and your budget. UltraHorn CC has everything that is needed UltraHorn antenna Precision holder

description: Ubiquiti USW-WAN is a 10-Gigabit WAN switch designed for high-availability networks . The switch is equipped with (2) 10G/1G SFP+ ports for connecting UniFi Cloud Gateways and (1) 10G/1G SFP+ port for WAN connectivity. title: Ubiquiti Wave MLO5
description: Ubiquiti Wave MLO5 is a high-performance WiFi 7 device featuring dual 5GHz radios to enhance throughput and provide reliable connectivity in PtP mode . In addition to 10G Ethernet with PoE support , the device is also equipped with one SFP+ port. On the top side, there are two RP-SMA connectors for wireless transmission and one SMA connector for connecting a GPS antenna. Thanks to its unified design, it is compatible with airMAX, airFiber X, UISP Dish, and UISP Horn antennas . A compatible… The first radio supports channel widths of 20, 40, 80, and 160 MHz, while the second radio adds an additional 240 MHz channel. The operating frequency range is 5180 - 5320, 5500 - 5700, and 5745 - 5825 MHz. A high level of security is ensured through WPA3-PSK encryption The maximum power consumption is 20W, and the unit is powered by a 54V / 0.56A PoE adapter with 10G Ethernet, which is included in the package. The unit supports a power input range of 22-27V and 44-54V This is an advanced feature that allows compatible WiFi 7 clients to simultaneously connect to multiple wireless frequencies broadcast by a single access point. Unlike traditional WiFi, which uses only one frequency band (2.4, 5, or 6 GHz) at a time, MLO enables clients to connect to multiple frequencies and select the optimal one for data transmission. Clients make this decision based on latency, throughput, or connection stability Device Metal clamp GPS antenna GPS antenna mount 10G PoE adapter 54V / 0.56A (2) Screws and wall plugs
